About

Security that
Actually Scales

I'm Abhinav Sharma — a cybersecurity practitioner, founder, and speaker from Bhopal, MP, currently pursuing B.Tech at Parul University, Vadodara.

My journey started as a volunteer with I4C (Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre) under the Ministry of Home Affairs, which opened doors to work directly with the Madhya Pradesh Police on cybercrime investigations, digital infrastructure, and public awareness at massive scale.

That path led me to found Global Offensive Security (GoSecurity) — a security startup helping Indian organizations with security audits, compliance, and cloud advisory. We're incubated at Parul University PIERC and backed by a ₹1.8 Lakh Government of Gujarat SSIP Grant.

I write on Medium & LinkedIn, speak at universities and tech communities, and advise startups on building security-first cultures from day one.

🛡️
Offensive Security
Red teaming, SSRF, DNS rebinding, pen testing methodologies.
☁️
Cloud Security
Cloud-native security architecture across AWS, Azure & GCP.
📋
GRC & Compliance
ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST, DPDPA — governance as code.
⚙️
DevSecOps
Security in CI/CD pipelines — shift left, ship confidently.
🔍
OSINT & Forensics
Open-source intelligence, digital forensics & cybercrime investigation.
🏛️
Gov. Advisory
Cyber governance & digital infrastructure for law enforcement.
Experience

The Journey

2024 – Present
Global Offensive Security (GoSecurity)
Founder & CEO

Founded a cybersecurity startup offering security audits, compliance advisory, and cloud security services to Indian startups and enterprises.

  • Incubated at Parul University PIERC, Vadodara
  • Awarded ₹1.80 Lakh grant by SSIP, Government of Gujarat
  • ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST framework compliance services
  • Cloud-native security architecture & DevSecOps integration
ISO 27001SOC 2Cloud SecurityDevSecOpsSSIP Grant ₹1.8L
2023 – 2024
Office of DGP & DIG Community Policing
Cybersecurity Advisor · MP Police Headquarters, Bhopal

Served as Cybersecurity Advisor to the Director General of Police, advising on cyber infrastructure and digital transformation across all of Madhya Pradesh.

  • Cyber & digital infrastructure advisory for MP Police statewide
  • Advised the PSO to DGP and field officers across MP
  • Led SafeClick Abhiyan — statewide public cyber safety initiative
  • Organized Cyber Safety Hackathon & Cyber Crime Intelligence & Investigation Summit
  • Reached 250+ colleges and 10,00,000+ rural citizens
MP Police HQSafeClick Abhiyan1M+ OutreachHackathon Lead
2022 – 2023
Superintendent of Police Office, Sehore District
Cybersecurity Consultant · IPS Mayank Awasthi

Worked directly with IPS Mayank Awasthi, SP Sehore, on cybersecurity advisory and digital infrastructure for the district police.

  • Digital forensics support for active cybercrime investigations
  • Police infrastructure improvement & digital advisory
  • Reached 10,000+ rural citizens on cybercrime awareness
  • Received Letter of Recommendation & Certificate of Appreciation for extraordinary contributions
Sehore PoliceIPS Mayank AwasthiCert. of AppreciationDigital Forensics
2021 – 2022
I4C — Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre
Cybersecurity Volunteer · Ministry of Home Affairs, GoI

Contributed to India's national cybercrime response framework as a volunteer — the foundation that unlocked every collaboration that followed.

  • Digital investigation support & governance framework contributions
  • Cybersecurity audit practices for national-level initiatives
I4CMHA · GoIDigital Investigation
🏆

Incubated @ Parul University PIERC · Government of Gujarat SSIP Awardee

GoSecurity is recognized under the Parul Innovation and Entrepreneurship Research Centre and is the recipient of a ₹1.80 Lakh SSIP grant from the Government of Gujarat — validating the mission to democratize enterprise-grade cybersecurity for Indian startups.

Moments in the Field

Writing

Published Articles

Medium · Red Team
The Phantom Pivot: Advanced Red Teaming Through SSRF & DNS Rebinding
Deep-dive into advanced offensive techniques using SSRF and DNS rebinding for lateral movement in enterprise environments.
→
Medium · Cyber Fraud
Understanding the Threat of Digital Arrest: A New Breed of Cyber Fraud
Breaking down the rising wave of "digital arrest" scams targeting Indian citizens and how to recognize and prevent them.
→
Medium · OSINT
Introduction to OSINT
A practical primer on Open-Source Intelligence gathering — tools, techniques, and real-world applications for security professionals.
→
Medium · Dark Web
The Truth About the Dark Web: What Is It & How Do You Access It?
Separating myth from reality — a no-nonsense explainer on the dark web, its structure, and the risks involved.
→
LinkedIn · Compliance
DPDPA: Operationalizing Trust — A Dual Perspective (2025)
A strategic analysis of India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act and what it means for organizations operationalizing compliance.
→
LinkedIn · Threat Intel
How One Company's Hack Exposed Data Sold on the Dark Web
A real-world case study tracing the journey from a corporate breach to data appearing on dark web marketplaces.
→
